headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on American Electric Power, Raises Price Target to $138
summary: Barclays  analyst Nicholas Campanella   maintains American Electric Power (NASDAQ:AEP) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $136 to $138.
